title: Ikhambo Lelifa Ngeemfundeni ZeSewula Afrika
subject: History
caps_topic: A heritage trail through the provinces of South Africa

sources.title: A glossary: Culture, heritage and identity
Celebrating cultural heritage in modern South Africa
Sterkfontein Caves, Krugersdorp (within the Cradle of Humankind World Heritage Site)
First celebration of National Heritage Day

slides.title: Ikhambo Lelifa Ngeemfundeni ZeSewula Afrika
slides.lead: Asikhambe siyokela iimfunda ezilithoba zoke sifumane iindawo ezikhethekileko, iindaba namasiko angawethu soke.

media.alt: Ibalazwe elinemibala leSewula Afrika elinamachaphaza atjengisa iindawo zelifa elizweni loke.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 200' role='img'><rect width='320' height='200' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 60 L150 46 L210 54 L262 78 L268 118 L232 152 L196 168 L150 160 L120 172 L92 150 L70 118 L54 92 Z' fill='#7a8b5a' stroke='#4d5c37' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='190' cy='84' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='210' cy='70' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='120' cy='150' r='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='215' cy='140' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='110' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M120 150 Q160 90 210 70' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Amukela abafundi begodu uhlathulule umqondo 'wekhambo lelifa' - ikhambo lokucabanga elima eendaweni ezikhethekileko kiSewula Afrika yoke. Buza: kukhona owakhe wavakatjhela imnyuziyamu, isakhiwo esidala, itjhugulukwane namkha indawo yemvelo? Ikhambo lelifa lihlanganisa iindawo lezi. Ekupheleni kwesifundo abafundi kufanele bakwazi ukubiza iindawo zelifa eemfundeni ezihlukeneko begodu bathi kubayini sizivikela.

slides.title: Yini ilifa?
slides.lead: Ilifa yikho koke esikuthola kwabaphila ngaphambili begodu esifuna ukukugcinela ingomuso.

blocks.text: **Ilifa** ziinto esizithola ebantwini abaphila ngaphambi kwethu. Kungaba ziinto esingazithinta, njengeenakhiwo ezidala namathulusi, neento esingekhe sizithinte, njengeengoma, iindaba, iinlimi namarisiphi. Ilifa lisisiza sazi ukuthi singobani begodu sivela kuphi.

items: **Ilifa lemvelo** - iintaba ezikhethekileko, imigedi, imilambo neenlwana.
**Ilifa lamasiko** - iinakhiwo, iindawo zesikhumbuzo, ubukghwari neento ezidala.
**Ilifa eliphilako** - iinlimi, umnzikazi, umdanso, ukudla nemigidi.

media.alt: Imifanekiso emithathu elula: intaba, isakhiwo esidala nesigujo, itjengisa iinhlobo ezintathu zelifa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 140' role='img'><rect width='300' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 110 L55 50 L90 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M55 50 L70 74 L60 82 Z' fill='#fff'/><rect x='120' y='60' width='60' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M116 60 L150 34 L184 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='142' y='80' width='16' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/><ellipse cx='250' cy='66' rx='24' ry='10' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M226 66 v34 a24 10 0 0 0 48 0 v-34' fill='#c8871f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nikela iimbonelo ezikhanyako ehlobo ngayinye ukuze abafundi beBanga 5 bakwazi ukuzicabanga: imvelo (iTable Mountain), amasiko (iUnion Buildings), okuphilako (ukuvuma isicathamiya, ibraai yomndeni, ukurhajwa kweentwana). Gcizelela bona ilifa eliphilako liphila ebantwini, ingasi esakhiweni. Mema abafundi babize ilifa elilodwa elivela emndenini wabo.

slides.title: Iindawo Zelifa Lephasi ZeSewula Afrika
slides.lead: Ezinye zeendawo zethu zikhetheke khulu kangangobana iphasi loke lisiza ukuzitlhogomela.

blocks.text: **Indawo Yelifa Lephasi** yindawo ekhethwe yihlangano ebizwa nge-**UNESCO** ngombana iqakathekile ebantwini boke bephasini, ingasi enarheni yinye kwaphela. ISewula Afrika inama-**lisumi** eendawo ezinjalo, ezisabalele eemfundeni. Ekhambweni lethu sizokuvakatjhela ezinye zazo.

items: Ezinye zikhethwe ngenca yemvelo, njengeentaba zeKapa neDrakensberg.
Ezinye zikhethwe ngenca yomlando, njengeMapungubwe neRobben Island.
Ukuba ohlwini kutjho bona indawo ivikelekile ebantwaneni bengomuso.

media.alt: Ibheji eyirawundi enephasi ngaphakathi, njengophawu lwelifa lephasi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 140' role='img'><rect width='200' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='46' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='70' r='26' fill='#a8bcae'/><path d='M74 70 h52 M100 44 v52 M82 54 q18 16 36 0 M82 86 q18 -16 36 0' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='118' width='80' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcina incazelo ilula: i-UNESCO liqembu leZizwe eziBumbeneko elenza uhla olukhethekileko lweendawo eziqakatheke khulu ephasini. Awutlhogi bona abafundi babambe inani elilikwazo - iphuzu kukuthi iSewula Afrika inothile ngeendawo ezinjalo. [SME] Sibawa uqinisekise inani lakhe leendawo zelifa lephasi ze-UNESCO zeSewula Afrika (bezililisumi ngo-2023) ngaphambi kobana isifundo siye emphakathini.

slides.title: Isitobi selifa sinye emfundeni ngayinye
slides.lead: Iimfunda ezilithoba, iindawo ezithoba ezidumileko ekufanele sizivakatjhele ekhambweni lethu.

blocks.heading: Gauteng
blocks.text: Cradle of Humankind - imigedi enamathambo abantu adala khulu.

blocks.heading: Limpopo
blocks.text: Mapungubwe - umbuso wokuthoma weSewula Afrika nobhejane wegolide.

blocks.heading: Western Cape
blocks.text: Robben Island - ijele lapho uNelson Mandela agcinwa khona.

blocks.heading: KwaZulu-Natal
blocks.text: Iintaba zeDrakensberg - iinkulungwana zemidwebo yamaSan emaweni.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape
blocks.text: Qunu neMthatha - iindawo zobutjhaneni bakaNelson Mandela.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape
blocks.text: Ilifa lamaSan nemibalo edala eyagujwa ematjeni eKaroo eyomileko.

blocks.heading: Free State
blocks.text: Imizana yamaBasotho neVredefort Dome eseduze.

blocks.heading: North West
blocks.text: Taung, lapho kwafunyanwa khona ukhakhayi lomntwana omdala.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga
blocks.text: Iintaba zeMakhonjwa zeBarberton - amanye wamatje amadala khulu ephasini.

slides.notes: Lesi sisiliyidi somtjhelo. Funda imfunda nginye nesitobi sayo ngezwi eliphakemeko, begodu ukhombe indawo etjho lapho ikhona ebalazweni lokucabanga (namkha ibalazwe lodonga nawunalo). Tjela abafundi bona amasiliyidi alandelako azokusondeza amanye wala. Ungabuza umfundi ngamunye bona akhethe isitobi afuna ukusivakatjhela khulu begodu athi kubayini. [SME] Qinisekisa bona ukuhlanganiswa kwemfunda nendawo kufaneleka eklasini yakho; imfunda nginye ineendawo zelifa ezinengi begodu abotitjhere bangathanda iimbonelo zendawo.

slides.title: I-Cradle of Humankind
slides.lead: Isiqhema semigedi eseduze neJohannesburg lapho iingcwephetjhi zafumana khona amanye wamathambo abantu adala khulu ephasini.

blocks.text: Emigedini yeSterkfontein (**Sterkfontein Caves**) iingcwephetjhi zaqheda **amafosili** - amathambo aphenduke amatje - wabantu bokuthoma abaphila iminyaka eziyingidi eyadlulako. Okufunyanwe okudumileko kufaka hlangana ukhakhayi olubizwa ngokuthi 'Mrs Ples' nesibhaxa esiphelele esibizwa ngokuthi 'Little Foot'. Kungalokho indawo le ibizwa ngokuthi *Cradle of Humankind* (Umthombo Wesintu).

items: Ikreyili yindawo lapho ingane ilala khona - ngalokho lena injengendawo yokubelethwa kwabantu.
Yindawo Yelifa Lephasi ngombana itjho indaba yabantu boke.
Usengakwazi ukuvakatjhela imigedi nemnyuziyamu namhlanjesi.

media.alt: Isiqheji semgedi ongaphasi komhlabathi onokhakhayi lwefosili ngaphakathi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='30' width='240' height='120' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M50 70 q70 -30 140 0 q20 30 -10 44 q-60 24 -120 0 q-30 -14 -10 -44 Z' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='120' cy='96' r='14' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='115' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='125' cy='94' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><rect x='114' y='104' width='12' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='24' width='240' height='8' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlathulula 'ifosili' ngokukhanyako: amathambo aphenduka amatje kancane-kancane isikhathi eside khulu. I-Little Foot noMrs Ples benza isayensi ibonakale iqiniseka ebafundini. Gcina umqondo wesikhathi eside butjhelezi - 'esikhathini eside khulu, eside kunanyana singasicabanga.' Buyela esiliyidini 5. [SME] Amalanga enziwe alula ngamabomu; qinisekisa nanyana ngimaphi amanani umtitjhere akhetha ukuwatjho ngezwi.

slides.title: Umbuso weMapungubwe
slides.lead: Kudaladala, phezu kwegquma elinesihloko esisipala etlhagwini kude, bekumi inarha yombuso wokuthoma weSewula Afrika.

blocks.text: Malungana neminyaka ema-700 ukuya kuma-800 eyadlulako, **iMapungubwe** bekumbuso omatasatasa lapho abantu bebalima, bafuye iinkomo begodu bathengiselana igolide neempondo zeendlovu neenarha ezikude. Ikosi beyihlala phezu kwegquma elikhethekileko. Abo-akheyoloji bathola lapho iinto ezihle zegolide, kufaka hlangana **ubhejane omncani wegolide**.

items: Kutjengisa bona imibuso emikhulu ye-Afrika beyikhona lapha kudala ngaphambi kobana amaYurobhu afike.
Ubhejane wegolide nje muphawu odumileko womlando weSewula Afrika.
IMapungubwe yindawo yelifa lephasi emngceleni neZimbabwe neBotswana.

media.alt: Igquma elinesihloko esisipala esinesibumbo esincani sobhejane wegolide phambili kwalo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 110 L60 60 Q60 52 70 52 L170 52 Q180 52 180 60 L180 110 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><ellipse cx='120' cy='52' rx='60' ry='8' fill='#c08a52'/><circle cx='210' cy='40' r='18' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#d4a017'><ellipse cx='120' cy='128' rx='26' ry='10'/><rect x='100' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><rect x='134' y='120' width='6' height='14'/><path d='M146 124 l10 -4 l-2 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Isiliyidi lesi silungisa inkolelo evamileko ngokutjengisa umbuso we-Afrika onamandla nonothileko obewuthuthuka kudala ngaphambi kwesikhathi sekoloniyali. Gcizelela ipahlopahlo (igolide neempondo zeendlovu ekwakuhamba kude ngelwandle) nobhejane wegolide njengegugu. Abafundi beBanga 6 bafunda ngeMapungubwe ngokutjhingako ngokuya phambili, ngalokho utjala imbewu. Gcina amalanga arawundwe ('malungana neminyaka ema-700-800 eyadlulako').

slides.title: Robben Island
slides.lead: Isihlengele esincani elwandle eseduze neKapa esaba ijele elidumileko - nomphawu wetjhaphuluko.

blocks.text: Iminyaka eminengi i-**Robben Island** beyilijele. Ngesikhathi sobandlululo, abarholi abalwela amalungelo alinganako bebavaleleke lapha, kude nemindeni yabo. **UNelson Mandela** wachitha iminyaka eminengi eseleni elincani esihlengeleni ngaphambi kobana atjhatjhululwe begodu ngokuya phambili aba mongameli wokuthoma weSewula Afrika okhethwe ngentando yenengi.

items: Namhlanjesi liyimnyuziyamu efundisa abavakatjhi ngomzabalazo wetjhaphuluko.
Abanye abarholi bendlela bebayiziboshwa ababelana ngeendaba zabo.
Lisikhumbuza ukuqakathekisa itjhaphuluko namalungelo esinawo namhlanjesi.

media.alt: Isihlengele esincani esinomkhanyiso elwandle, kuneTable Mountain kude.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#cfe3ec'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='54' fill='#5f86a3'/><path d='M150 70 L215 70 L215 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#8a9b78'/><path d='M150 70 L160 70 L160 96 L150 96 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='100' rx='58' ry='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='72' width='12' height='30' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 72 L78 72 L72 60 L66 60 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='63' y='60' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha ubandlululo ngokunakekela nangokulula ebafundini beBanga 5: abanye abantu bebaphathwa ngokungakalungi ngenca yombala wesikhumba sabo, begodu abantu abanesibindi basebenza ukutjhugulula lokho. Beka i-Robben Island njengendawo yobuhlungu nethemba. Yihlanganisa neFreedom Day namkha uNelson Mandela nangabe abafundi bayamazi. Balekela imininingwana ebuhlungu; nakekela isibindi nokuqakatheka kwetjhaphuluko.

slides.title: Imidwebo Yamatje YeDrakensberg
slides.lead: Phezulu eentabeni zeDrakensberg kunemidwebo eziinkulungwana eyenziwa maSan kudala.

blocks.text: I-**uKhahlamba-Drakensberg** liriphu leentaba eliphakeme khulu eSewula Afrika. Imigedi nemitjhitjhi yayo yamawa iqophele iinkulungwana **zemidwebo yematjeni** eyenziwa **maSan** abazingeli-mavuni. Bebadweba abantu, iimphofu, neenkolelo zabo basebenzisa ipende yemvelo evela ematjeni, eemilweni neenlwaneni.

items: Ibizo elithi uKhahlamba litjho 'isivimbelo semikhonto' ngesiZulu.
Imidwebo ineminyaka emakhulu ngitjho neenkulungwana.
Yindawo yelifa lephasi ngenca yemvelo yayo nobukghwari bayo obudala.

media.alt: Idonga lomgedi elinemidwebo yamaSan yephofu nesibumbo somuntu obalekako.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 150' role='img'><rect width='240' height='150' fill='#e6dcc4'/><path d='M0 0 L240 0 L240 24 Q120 40 0 24 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><g fill='#8a4b2a'><ellipse cx='150' cy='84' rx='34' ry='20'/><rect x='124' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='140' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='158' y='98' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='176' y='96' width='6' height='24'/><path d='M184 70 l16 -14 l2 6 Z'/><path d='M188 74 l16 -10 l0 6 Z'/></g><g fill='#7a2f1a'><circle cx='60' cy='70' r='7'/><rect x='57' y='77' width='6' height='22'/><path d='M60 82 l-14 8 M60 82 l14 6 M60 99 l-10 18 M60 99 l12 16' stroke='#7a2f1a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Vezela abafundi amaSan njengabantu bokuthoma beSewula Afrika nabadwebi neenkulumeli ezinamakghono. Hlathulula bona ipende beyenziwa njani ngezinto zemvelo (i-okha, amalahle, umnkambo weemili, amafutha weenlwana). Iphofu beyisilwane esiqakatheke khulu eenkolelweni zamaSan. Phatha ilifa lamaSan ngehlonipho - le mifanekiso eyingcwele emiphakathini yezizukulwana. Yihlanganisa nemibalo egujwe ematjeni yeNorthern Cape esiliyidini elilandelako.

slides.title: NgeKaroo neFree State
slides.lead: Iintobi ezintathu ezingezelelweko ekhambweni lethu - eEastern Cape, eNorthern Cape neFree State.

blocks.heading: Eastern Cape - Qunu
blocks.text: Amagquma aluhlaza lapho uNelson Mandela akhulela khona. Imnyuziyamu eMthatha itjho indaba yepilo yakhe.

blocks.heading: Northern Cape - Wildebeest Kuil
blocks.text: Igquma elivalwe yimibalo edala egujwe ematjeni, elitlhogonyelwa yimiphakathi yamaSan namaKhoe.

blocks.heading: Free State - Umzana wamaBasotho
blocks.text: Imnyuziyamu ephilako lapho ungabona khona izindlu zesintu zamaBasotho ezinamadonga apendwe kuhle.

media.alt: Iindawo ezincani ezintathu: amagquma, ilitje elinemibalo egujiweko, nendlu eyirawundi ependiweko.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 130' role='img'><rect width='300' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M10 90 q25 -30 50 0 q25 30 50 0 L110 110 L10 110 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M120 60 l50 8 l-6 44 l-46 -6 Z' fill='#a8794a'/><g stroke='#5a3a1a' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><circle cx='140' cy='84' r='8'/><path d='M150 78 l10 4 M132 92 l-6 8'/></g><path d='M212 108 a30 30 0 0 1 60 0 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M206 82 l36 -22 l36 22 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><rect x='236' y='90' width='12' height='18' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2'><path d='M214 100 h46 M218 106 h38'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Iintobi ezintathu lezi zibanzisa ikhambo ziye eemfundeni ezinengi neenhlobo ezinengi zelifa: indawo yokubelethwa komuntu (Eastern Cape), ubukghwari obudala (imibalo egujiweko yeNorthern Cape, egujwe ematjeni kunokudwetjhwa phezu kwawo), nelifa eliphilako emzaneni osebenzako (Free State). Dweba umahluko phakathi kwemidwebo yematjeni (KZN) nemibalo egujwe ematjeni (Northern Cape). [SME] Buyisela iindawo zeEastern Cape namkha eFree State zendawo nangabe zifaneleka abafundi bakho ngcono.

slides.title: Amatje adala nomntwana omdala
slides.lead: Iintobi zethu zemfunda ezimbili zokugcina ziya eNorth West neMpumalanga.

blocks.heading: North West - Taung
blocks.text: Ngo-1924 ukhakhayi lwefosili lomntwana omdala, i-'Taung Child', lwafunyanwa lapha. Lwasiza iphasi lifunde bona abantu bathoma e-Afrika.

blocks.heading: Mpumalanga - Barberton
blocks.text: Iintaba zeMakhonjwa ziqophe amanye wamatje amadala khulu ephasini - malungana neminyaka eziyingidi ezi-3 500 - nje yindawo yelifa lephasi.

blocks.heading: Ibhonasi - Gauteng
blocks.text: IFreedom Park neConstitution Hill etlhagwini zikhumbula umzabalazo wamalungelo wabantu nentando yenengi.

media.alt: Ukhakhayi olincani lwefosili eduze kwentaba ezidala ezinemikhakha.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 130' role='img'><rect width='240' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M120 30 L180 110 L60 110 Z' fill='#6b7a8c'/><path d='M170 55 L210 110 L130 110 Z' fill='#8091a3'/><path d='M60 70 L95 110 L25 110 Z' fill='#5a6878'/><g><circle cx='95' cy='84' r='16' fill='#e6ddc8'/><circle cx='89' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><circle cx='100' cy='82' r='3' fill='#3a2c1c'/><path d='M90 92 q5 5 10 0' fill='none' stroke='#3a2c1c' stroke-width='2'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: ITaung ihlanganisa nomqondo we-Cradle of Humankind - iSewula Afrika iphakathi kwendaba yemvelaphi yabantu. IBarberton itjengisa ilifa lemvelo lehlobo elihlukileko: amatje adala khulu. Ikarada yebhonasi ikuvumela ukhulume ngeendawo zentando yenengi zeGauteng (Freedom Park, Constitution Hill). [SME] Qinisekisa umnyaka wokufunyanwa kweTaung Child (1924) nobudala obarawundiweko bamatje (malungana neminyaka eziyingidi ezi-3 500) nawuwatjho ngezwi.

slides.title: Ilifa eliphilako neLanga Lelifa
slides.lead: Ingasi loke ilifa elihlala lithule emnyuziyamu - elinye lalo liphila kilokho esikwenzako qobe langa.

blocks.text: **Ilifa eliphilako** ligatjiselwa kubozanyana kuya kababelethi kuya ebantwaneni. Lifaka **iinlimi zethu ezisemthethweni ezili-11**, iingoma nemidanso yethu, iindaba zethu, iimbatho zethu nokudla kwethu okuthandekako. Qobe mnyaka ngo-**24 Septhemba** iSewula Afrika igidinga i-**Langa Lelifa**, lapho sihlonipha amasiko wethu woke ahlukeneko.

items: Umnzikazi nomdanso njenge-isicathamiya, umdanso wamabhutsu ne-amapiano.
Ukudla njengepapa, ibunny chow, amakoeksisters, umngqusho nechakalaka.
Iindaba, iimbongo (izibongo) nemidlalo eyabelwana phakathi kwemindeni.

media.alt: Iimphawu zomnzikazi, isigujo nepuleti lokudla okumela ilifa eliphilako.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 130' role='img'><rect width='260' height='130' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='60' cy='70' rx='30' ry='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M30 70 v26 a30 14 0 0 0 60 0 v-26' fill='#c8871f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='140' cy='90' r='8'/><rect x='146' y='52' width='4' height='40'/><circle cx='176' cy='82' r='8'/><rect x='182' y='46' width='4' height='38'/><path d='M148 52 h36 v8 h-36 Z'/></g><circle cx='222' cy='84' r='24' fill='#fff' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M210 84 q12 -14 24 0' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='216' cy='80' r='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='230' cy='86' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza lesi sibe sisiliyidi esinokusebenzisana khulu. Buza abafundi babelane ngengoma, ukudla namkha indaba evela emakhaya wabo. Gcizelela bona ilifa eliphilako ngelabo boke begodu liragela phambili nokutjhuguluka - i-amapiano lilifa elitjha elenziwa nje khonokho. Hlathulula iLanga Lelifa ngokulula: iholideyi lomphakathi lokugidinga amasiko wethu woke ndawonye. Qinisa ihlonipho ngokwahluka.

slides.title: Ukutlhogomela ilifa lethu
slides.lead: Ilifa ngelethu soke, ngalokho soke kufanele sisize ukulivikela.

blocks.text: Nangabe iinakhiwo ezidala ziyawa, imidwebo yematjeni iyakrwatjhwa, namkha iindaba azisatjhiwo godu, ilifa lelo lilahleka unomphela. Kungalokho sinemi-**nyuziyamu**, iindawo **zesikhumbuzo** nemithetho evikela iindawo ezikhethekileko. Kodwana abantu bomango bayasiza godu - ngokuvakatjha, ukufunda nokugatjisela lokho abakwaziko.

items: Ungathinti namkha ulimaze ubukghwari bematjeni namkha iinto ezidala.
Vakatjhela iimnyuziyamu neendawo zelifa ukufunda iindaba zazo.
Lalela abadala begodu ugatjisele iindaba zabo kabanye.

media.alt: Izandla ezimbili ezibambe kancane isakhiwo esincani nesihlahla, zitjengisa ukutlhogomela ilifa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 140' role='img'><rect width='240' height='140' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q-8 -34 20 -40 l0 20 q30 -6 44 0 l0 -20 q28 6 20 40 Z' fill='#e0b98a'/><rect x='96' y='52' width='34' height='34' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M92 52 L113 34 L134 52 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='10' height='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='160' cy='58' r='20' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='156' y='58' width='8' height='30' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Letha isifundo emqondweni w'so kubayini' - ilifa liyisilokelo begodu lingalahleka. Yihlanganisa amathiphu amathathu nokuziphatha kwamambala ekhambweni lesikolo. Qinisa ihlonipho ngeendawo eziyingcwele njengobukghwari bematjeni bamaSan. Ungabuza abafundi babize into eyodwa abazoyenza ukuvikela ilifa. Lokhu kulungiselela imibuzo yokubuyekeza.

slides.title: Esikufundileko ekhambweni
slides.lead: Sikhambe ngeemfunda ezilithoba zoke sahlangana nelifa lemvelo, lamasiko neliphilako.

blocks.text: Ukusukela emigedini ye-**Cradle of Humankind** ukuya embusweni we-**Mapungubwe**, ijele le-**Robben Island** neentaba ezinemidwebo ze-**Drakensberg**, ilifa leSewula Afrika litjho indaba yabantu bayo boke. Ilifa ngelabo boke, begodu wonke umuntu angasiza ukulivikela.

blocks.question: Biza iindawo zelifa ezintathu ezihlukeneko begodu utjho bona ngayinye isemfundeni yiphi.
Hlathulula umahluko phakathi kwelifa lemvelo, ilifa lamasiko nelifa eliphilako. Nikela isibonelo esisodwa sehlobo ngalinye.
Kubayini kuqakathekile ukutlhogomela ilifa lethu? Nikela amabanga amabili.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi otloliweko namkha ingxoxo yeklasi. Umbuzo 1 uhlola ukukhumbula iindawo neemfunda; umbuzo 2 uhlola umqondo oqakathekileko weenhlobo ezintathu zelifa; umbuzo 3 uhlola ukuzwisisa kobana kubayini ilifa liqakathekile. Ukwabiwa kwamamaki kulandela isitayela seCAPS seIntermediate Phase. Vala ngokukhumbuza abafundi bona nabo bayingcenye yelifa eliphilako leSewula Afrika.
